name: Basement Demon
description:
WARNINGS: SPIT, KISSING, ADDICTION, LATEX, GASLIGHTING, TRANSFORMATION, MUSK.

Your grandpa passed away, leaving you his old house. Your relationship with good old gramps was good, mostly because you were the only one who gave his insane rambling about demons and angels existing some thought and also you didn't treat him like a senile old goat. Well, you only had your shitty rented apartment so... Moving in was an easy decision mostly because the house was fine, but you never expected what you would find hidden in his basement.

Artist: ohitsuji

Please do not harass the artist.

Hey, it is Mia bringing you another weird bot! At this point, you guys know my bots are strange... Also finding art without any lewd stuff on it is hard...I had this entire concept of a ball steal-Coff Coff Well anyway! I hope you guys don't get too addicted to this one... It is quite dangerous!
creator: Mia4Fun
